quirks: Zero gas — eth_gasPrice returns 0x0; some libraries reject gasPrice: 0
Permissioned QBFT — only validators propose; add/remove via qbft_proposeValidatorVote
HTTP JSON-RPC only — no WebSocket subscriptions
Public RPC — no auth; Cloudflare → nginx → socat → node1
Primary public RPC: VPS http://51.75.64.28/novaone-rpc/ (verified July 2026)

anakaConnect.role: middleware between AnakaBank services and Nova Bank Railway

statusProbe.interpretation: host up; SSH and HTTP app stack not serving — restart requires OVH/SSH credentials

walletIntegrity.primaryOpsFix: Restart Anaka Connect on 51.75.64.28 (novaBankVPS) — bridge offline blocks spendability from AnakaBank
walletIntegrity.railwayApiQuirk: Direct Railway calls with 4-digit fromAccountId still 404 Wallet not found (UUID required) — separate NestJS patch
walletIntegrity.blocker: Private nova NestJS monorepo not accessible from this agent; set NOVA_API_ROOT and deploy to Railway

notes: novablockchainsystem.com returns Cloudflare 521 — use Railway and VPS fallbacks below
anakatech.llc/novaone-rpc redirects without JSON-RPC — use VPS primary
Bitcoin rpcUrls intentionally empty (explorer-only via mempool.space)

51.75.64.28.error: TCP accept; HTTP connection reset (Anaka Connect / NovaONE RPC)
